attributes.action: Ban the intentional injection, release or dispersion of chemicals over UK skies
attributes.additional_details:
This activity has banned in Tennessee (2024), Florida (2025) and Montana (2025). Similar legislation has also been introduced in Texas, Pennsylvania, North Carolina, Vermont, Iowa, and Louisiana. 
The blocking of the sun over the relatively tiny UK skies has negligible net effect on global temperatures or the weather. It has a very high risk to the health and well being of UK citizens and is potentially very damaging to the environment as has been recognised by the aforementioned US States.
attributes.background: Ban the intentional injection, release, or dispersion of chemicals into the atmosphere to affect temperature, weather, or sunlight over the skies of the UK. These toxic chemical are damaging to the health of all forms of life including humans and the environment.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: 
Ban atmospheric geoengineering in UK
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758008
